osm.note: The data included in this document is from www.openstreetmap.org. The data is made available under ODbL.

tag.v: File:Hilton San Francisco Financial District panorama.jpg
San Francisco Bay Ferry;Golden Gate Ferry;Treasure Island Ferry
Golden Gate Bridge, Highway & Transportation District
Golden Gate Bridge, Highway & Transportation District
street-level entrance to San Francisco Centre
street-level entrance to San Francisco Centre
Access via CitiGroup Center building elevators
File:YBCA Novellus Theater west side walkway entrance 2.JPG
Although the intersection has traffic lights, there are no pedestrian traffic control signals on this crossing.
Stockton Street & Geary Street / Union Square
These are below the stairs and accessible through a set of doors at street level.
It looks like this extends into a tunnel
It looks like this extends into a tunnel
Is this an appropriate tag? It is really a bicycle crossing, not a pedestrian one.
street entrance mainly for upper level offices/classrooms
Author Dashiell Hammett lived a few months in 1926 at 20 Monroe Street building. Street renamed after him.
area is under construction and changing frequently
Commemorative Emperor Norton Pl applies to 600 block only
trolleybuses currently running off-wire until trolley wire is built
trolleybuses currently running off-wire until trolley wire is built
not officially part of the Interstate Highway System (west of unbuilt I-280)
Dr. Rolland and Kathryn Lowe Community Bridge
Pagoda is the western name, Hang Ah is the Chinese name. It is signed both ways. One end as Pagoda and one end as Hang Ah. It is definetly not two different streets, though.
trolleybuses currently running off-wire until trolley wire is built
City has labeled this "Battery Bridge" and painted a mural on the asphalt. Has noticeable incline/decline over (possibly unused) parking exit.
used during bus substitution of street rail service
Found it on city planning docs. Is this here at all? Driveable?
Ellipses are part of the official name
step-free access for buses but not light rail; pass through platform to reach accessible light rail platform
step-free access for buses but not light rail; pass through platform to reach accessible light rail platform

trolleybuses currently running off-wire until trolley wire is built
This segment is *not* one-way, even though it was one-way a number of years ago. Please do not mark it as one-way based on old imagery.

oneway as of 2020, according to imagery

This elevator serves level 0 (street level) and level 3 (park) but no levels in between.

Steve Silver Beach Blanket Babylon Gallery Terrace
Access to this area may limited to SFMOMA special exhibition ticket holders if the adjoining building part has a special exhibition.
Despite the name Sculpture Terrace used by operator SFMOMA for this area, sculpture are not neccessarily featured here.
